channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Tesla Earnings, Elon Musk Loom: What Investors Want To Know (Live Coverage)
item.description: Tesla earnings are expected to jump, but investors want to hear from Elon Musk about his company's expensive push into real-world AI.

item.title: France won’t approve Tesla ‘FSD’ yet, wants EU-wide sign-off first
item.description: France’s Transport Minister, Philippe Tabarot, says the country won’t authorize Tesla’s “Full Self-Driving” (Supervised) “as it currently stands,” pointing to two safety problems: the system lets drivers speed, and it doesn’t keep them attentive enough in cities. But this isn’t France slamming th...

item.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Climbs, Nasdaq Lags; This Biotech Hits A High (Live Coverage)
item.description: Stock Market Today: The Dow Jones index is rising Wednesday. SMCI stock climbs. Alphabet and Tesla earnings are due after the market close.

item.title: Tesla Stock Is Down In Afternoon Trading
item.description: Investors are waiting. Tesla shares are down 0.5% in midday trading at $377.20, ahead of the company's second-quarter earnings report on Wednesday evening. That's a small move for Tesla stock.

item.title: Predicting SpaceX's Valuation at the End of 2026
item.description: SpaceX's stock price could get cut in half from here by year-end.

item.title: Update: Equities Mixed Intraday as Traders Await Alphabet, Tesla Results
item.description: (Updates with latest market prices and developments.) US benchmark equity indexes were mixed intr

item.title: First Look at Tesla's Custom Wraps Feature in the Mobile App [VIDEO]
item.description: First Look at Tesla's Custom Wraps Feature in the Mobile App [VIDEO]

item.title: Tesla Updates App to 4.59: Adds Robot Commands, Ability to Upload Wraps and Self-Driving Stats
item.description: Tesla Updates App to 4.59: Adds Robot Commands, Ability to Upload Wraps and Self-Driving Stats

item.title: Tesla is about to make parking in busy lots less stressful than ever
item.description: Tesla is about to make parking in busy parking lots at businesses and other points of interest less stressful than ever by allowing drivers more control over where they park and how, CEO Elon Musk confirmed on X. Tesla has been working to improve the parking performance of vehicles utilizing the ...

item.title: The Tesla Diner Was The World's Most Utilized Supercharger In Its First Year
item.description: The Tesla Diner delivered more electricity than any other Supercharger station in the world, averaging 1,600 sessions per day.

item.title: Iran Didn't Give Tesla Much of a Boost in Q2
item.description: Tesla sold 124,800 vehicles in the U.S. in the second quarter, according to Cox Automotive. It's the third consecutive quarter that Tesla has captured more than half of the market.

item.title: Tesla Autopilot and FSD crashes hit record 207 in a single month
item.description: Tesla reported 207 crashes involving its driver-assist systems in a single month — the most it has ever logged. The figure comes from Tesla’s own crash reports to the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA). The record month lands as Tesla pushes Full Self-Driving harder than ever,...

item.title: Cathie Wood Says SpaceX Could Be the Most Important Company in History, and She’s Buying the 38% Dip
item.description: Cathie Wood just called SpaceX the most important company in history and started buying a 38% dip that has a $116 billion share unlock waiting on the other side. Her actual thesis has almost nothing to do with rockets.

item.title: Tesla beat on deliveries. Can it convince investors on spending?
item.description: Tesla Inc (NASDAQ:TSLA) reports second-quarter results after the bell Wednesday, and the numbers investors already have in hand tell a split story: a blowout on deliveries, a question mark on spending. The electric vehicle maker posted 480,126 deliveries and 451,758 vehicles produced for the...

item.title: Tesla to train Optimus with employees at Grünheide plant
item.description: Tesla will use employees at its Grünheide vehicle plant to help train its humanoid robot, Optimus, by recording human movement patterns during assembly work. At the same time, the company is expanding its robotics activities in Reutlingen, where it is developing components and production processe...

item.title: France Says Tesla’s FSD Falls Short Of Safety Bar – Retail Turns Focus To Q2 Earnings
item.description: France has flagged risks related to speeding, driver attention, and performance in complex urban environments.

item.title: Big Tech Earnings Live: Google Parent Alphabet, Tesla and IBM Set to Report After the Closing Bell Today
item.description: Alphabet and Tesla will kick off the Magnificent 7 earnings season later Wednesday, while several other large tech companies are also scheduled to release results that will help determine where the AI trade is headed next.

item.title: Three Things to Watch Beyond Earnings
item.description: Investors should be on the lookout for updates on robo-taxis, robots, and Full Self Driving (FSD). "Key to the earnings call is how fast Elon promises to scale up unsupervised autonomy without safety monitors," says Future Fund Active ETF cofounder Gary Black. Any concrete guidance on the number ...

item.title: Tesla Is Expanding Grok to All of Europe and More of Asia
item.description: Tesla Is Expanding Grok to All of Europe and More of Asia

item.title: Tesla starts preparing for Optimus in its smartphone app
item.description: Tesla is starting to prepare for the launch of the Optimus robot in its smartphone app, new coding strings show. Elon Musk has referred to Optimus as what will be the greatest-selling product of any kind of all time, and now, Tesla is getting ready for its launch. Tesla’s smartphone app had sever...

item.title: Tesla Q2 Earnings: Here’s what to expect
item.description: Tesla ( NASDAQ: TSLA ) will report its earnings for the second quarter of 2026 this evening after market close, and investors and analysts are waiting anxiously to see what the company will report for the second three-month span of the year. Analysts have already put out their expectations from a...

item.title: Tesla Faces Crowded Short Bets Before Earnings
item.description: Weak technical signals and rising bearish positions raise the stakes for Wednesday's report.

item.title: Tesla Short Interest Builds Before Earnings
item.description: Earnings could deepen the selloff or spark a short squeeze

item.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Falls As Oil Prices Jump; SMCI Surges With Alphabet, Tesla Earnings Next (Live Coverage)
item.description: Stock Market Today: The Dow Jones index dropped Wednesday as oil prices jumped. SMCI stock surged, with Alphabet and Tesla earnings due.

item.title: Tesla earnings are coming — here's how investors can protect against the downside: Alpha Options Playbook
item.description: Tesla stock has spent nearly a year going sideways. Wednesday's earnings could finally break the stalemate.

item.title: Why Alphabet, Tesla, and IBM Earnings Will Decide Micron’s Fate
item.description: With tech earnings on tap from the likes of Alphabet, Tesla, IBM, memory-chip maker Micron could be in for a wild ride.

item.title: Price Prediction: Two Magnificent Seven Stocks, Two Bold Price Targets for 2027
item.description: Tesla is bleeding year-to-date losses while Google shrugs off a 46% free cash flow collapse, yet both Magnificent Seven giants share the same bold 2027 price target gap. The catalysts that close it are anything but identical.

item.title: Electric, autonomous, and there’s 800 of them: inside this week’s BIGGEST deal
item.description: In a massive deployment of self-driving trucks that makes most autonomous and electric vehicle deployments look tiny in comparison, Chinese heavy equipment brand Tonly just signed a deal to deliver 800 autonomous, “New Energy” mining trucks to Xinjiang Hanxiang.

item.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall As Oil Prices Jump; Two AI Earnings Movers With Google, Tesla Due
item.description: Futures fell as oil prices jumped after the S&P 500 reclaimed key support Tuesday. Super Micro and GE Vernova were big earnings movers Google, Tesla earnings loom.

item.title: Nasdaq tipped to slip as investors brace for Alphabet and Tesla earnings
item.description: Wall Street stocks looked set for a weaker open on Wednesday as investors lock in profits in technology stocks ahead of crucial earnings from Google owner Alphabet and Tesla, while escalating tensions in the Middle East push oil prices to six-week highs. Dow Jones futures were down 0.2%,...

item.title: Tesla Stock Slips Ahead Of Today's Earnings. Here's What Investors Want To Know.
item.description: Tesla stock fell about 0.5% before Wednesday's open. Heading into today's earnings call investors are eager for updates about robotaxis and Optimus robots, which are key to Tesla's push into AI.

item.title: Stocks Fall Pre-Bell Ahead of Alphabet, Tesla Earnings
item.description: The main US stock measures were pointing lower in Wednesday's premarket activity as investors await

item.title: Tesla Stock Is Lower in Early Trading
item.description: Tesla stock was down in premarket trading ahead of earnings. Shares of the electric vehicle maker were down 0.3% in premarket trading, while S&P 500 futures were off 0.2%. Coming into Wednesday trading, Tesla stock was down about 16% year-to-date and up about 15% over the past 12 months.

item.title: Tesla opens first public 1.2 MW Megacharger for Semi in California
item.description: Tesla has opened its first full-scale public Megacharger station for the Semi in California. The new site in Bloomington features six charging stalls delivering up to 1.2 MW each and supports the latest-generation Tesla Semi with the MC2 charging connector.

item.title: Tesla, Alphabet, IBM Report Today: Why Are Options Traders Paying 86% Volatility?
item.description: Options traders price outsized moves as Tesla, Alphabet, and IBM report Q2 earnings after Wednesday's closing bell.

item.title: Tesla earnings train spotlight on SpaceX plans, AI investments
item.description: Tesla's second-quarter earnings report will provide insights into the state of the core business — but it's the company's future that investors will be focused on more than ever.

item.title: Tesla Mobile App gets a new feature that wrap fans are going to love
item.description: Tesla’s latest 2026 Summer Update quietly closes out one of the more tedious steps in personalizing a Tesla’s digital appearance. Uploading a custom wrap design used to require a USB drive. Now it doesn’t.

item.title: Will SpaceX buy Tesla? Musk may soon offer clues on his plans
item.description: Elon Musk is now a trillionaire. Is his next big move a merger between Tesla and SpaceX into a $3 trillion behemoth?

item.title: Can Google and Tesla Keep the AI Trade Going?
item.description: This is a big day for the market, with Google owner Alphabet and electric vehicle manufacturer Tesla both set to report after the closing bell to kick off earnings season for Big Tech. Alphabet's earnings could be a make-or-break moment for the artificial-intelligence trade, which has faltered in...

item.title: USA: Hyundai cuts Ioniq 5 N price for 2026 model year
item.description: Hyundai has reduced the starting price of the 2026 Ioniq 5 N in the US by $6,300 while introducing several technical updates. The performance EV now comes standard with a NACS charging port, bundled charging adapters and a revised drift mode.

item.title: Elon Musk handed Grok something no other AI company can get their hands on
item.description: Elon Musk said Tuesday that SpaceX will feed its internal engineering data into the next major training run for Grok, the AI model now folded into SpaceX following February’s merger. In a post on X, Musk wrote that SpaceX’s “massive corpus of world-class engineering data,” excluding anything rest...

item.title: Tesla Model Y & Model 3 Dominate US EV Market, But Who Completes The Top 10?
item.description: The United States EV market is an … interesting market. It is so much less diverse than the Chinese or European EV market, but it has gotten far more models in the past few years. That said, Tesla still dominates the market.

item.title: TSLA Robotaxis Being Unloaded in Los Angeles! (Tesla Diner)
item.description: Spotted this morning at 5am on my way to work off Santa Monica Blvd!!!! Excuse my French! https://reddit.com/link/1v34isz/video/7ienedv4bpeh1/player submitted by /u/gravedigger997 [link] [comments]

item.title: Tesla Earnings Today: What to Expect as Investors Eye Profit Margins Over Deliveries
item.description: Tesla reports Q2 earnings today. Here's what to expect on EPS, revenue, margins, and robotaxi updates from Elon Musk's flagship company.

item.title: TSLA Stock Jumps 3% Ahead Of Q2 Report — Analysts Split On Earnings Beat Expectations And Tesla’s Overpromise Problem
item.description: Gene Munster forecasts Tesla automotive gross margins slightly above the Street’s 19.5% estimate.

item.title: Elon Musk Says Traffic Will Get Worse With Robot Cars, Reaffirms Tesla FSD Will Remember Individual Preferences
item.description: Tesla Inc. CEO Elon Musk has predicted that self-driving cars will cause traffic to increase in the future as more vehicles will be on the road. Robot Cars Will Make Traffic Worse On Sunday, Musk responded to investment firm Mach...

item.title: FSD V14 Lite Rolling out wide today
item.description: It finally arrived! 2022 MYP submitted by /u/Zestyclose-Peace5050 [link] [comments]

item.title: Dow Jones Futures: S&P 500 Regains 50-Day As Sandisk, Micron Soar; Google, Tesla Earnings Due
item.description: The S&P 500 reclaimed key support as Sandisk, Micron and AI stocks led a broad rally. Google, Tesla earnings loom.

item.title: Tesla Update FSD V14.3.6 & FSD 14 Lite (2026.20.6.11) Release Notes
item.description: Tesla Update FSD V14.3.6 & FSD 14 Lite (2026.20.6.11) Release Notes

item.title: S&P 500, Dow Snap Three-Day Losses, Nasdaq Ends Best Day In Three Weeks As Earnings Take Centerstage — GOOGL, AAPL, AMD, TSLA, DIS In Focus
item.description: The Philadelphia Semiconductor Index jumped over 5%, its best single-day gain in a month, as bargain buyers piled onto semiconductor stocks.
